Welcome to PaperPlacer!

This is a simple web application that lets you upload catalogues of documents, images or any files, really, and view them on the web!

On the left, you can find all the sections on this instance of PaperPlacer. They contain links to files on the internet (images, PDF pages, etc.), which are neatly categorised.

In each section, you can find categories, which contain more links. These can be used to organise them in any way you want. In the grand scheme of things, the structure ends up resembling a file system.

To upload a catalogue or a category, click the Upload catalogue! button in the header. The page there contains instructions on how to import data.

To remove a catalogue or a category, you will need an administrator password. If you do not have the password, you probably shouldn't be deleting anything. Nevertheless, when deleting a category or section, you need to specify its full path, beginning with the section (e.g. when deleting "Mocha" in "Coffee" in "Drink Recipes", you specify Drink Recipes/Coffee/Mocha).

Sometimes uploading and removing categories takes time, so don't be scared when you see a loading page :)
